title: Blackspur BB-BH216 6' HD Cable Bicycle Lock
features: This heavy duty cable bicycle lock is manufactured from extra tough steel & comes with an integrated lock.
It is vinyl covered to help protect against scratching & dents.
It is self coiling making it easy to use & carry & it comes with a free carrying bracket.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
